visual_attributes.morphology: flat, tapering body with six appendages branching into rayed, finger-like cerata
distinctive_features: countershading with blue ventral side and silver-grey dorsal side
dark blue stripes on the head
cerata arranged in a single row
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: cerata extend laterally from peduncles with a short stalk, arranged in a uniseriate row

domain_specific_visual.COUNTERSHADING: blue ventral side, silver-grey dorsal side

domain_specific_functional.KLEPTOCNIDY: stores nematocysts from prey for defense
domain_specific_functional.HERMAPHRODITIC_REPRODUCTION: both individuals can lay eggs after mating

relationships.description: feeds on and stores nematocysts from this organism
closely related species within the same family

contextual_attributes.origin: pelagic zones of the world's oceans
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: known for its striking appearance and unique predatory behavior
